text: Senate confirms new Fed chair as Trump allies warn rate cuts may have to wait - The Washington Post
fullText: Kevin Warsh has promised to remake the central bank. His near party-line confirmation showed how far Washington political divides now extend to the Fed.

text: Man convicted of running secret Chinese spy outpost in New York City - Politico
fullText: “A police station operating in New York City at the direction of the Chinese government has been exposed,” U.S. Attorney Joseph Nocella Jr. said.

text: Denise Powell wins Democratic primary for Nebraska's 2nd congressional district - NPR
fullText: Political organizer Denise Powell has defeated State Sen. John Cavanaugh to win the Democratic primary in the closely watched race for Nebraska's second congressional district.

text: PNW doctor from hantavirus ship taken to special isolation unit - The Seattle Times
fullText: An oncologist traveling on a cruise ship amid a hantavirus outbreak says he's the lone American isolated at a special biocontainment unit in Nebraska.

text: Body of second U.S. soldier who went missing amid training exercise recovered in Morocco - CBS News
fullText: The Army identified the soldier as Spc. Mariyah Collington.

text: Teenage Sex and Death at Camp Miasma review: Slasher fans get the homage they deserve - Roger Ebert
fullText: It’s a film that owes equal debts to “Sunset Blvd.” and “Jason X,” which means it’s pretty special.

text: Allegiant completes merger with Sun Country - The Points Guy
fullText: Allegiant Air and Sun Country merge to create eighth largest airline in the U.S.

text: China gains major edge on U.S. amid Iran war, intelligence report finds - The Washington Post
fullText: A confidential assessment, circulating as President Donald Trump begins his highly anticipated trip to Beijing, shows shifts in several key areas of competition.

text: Lakers Notes: LeBron, Reaves, Doncic, Front Office - Hoops Rumors
fullText: Rob Pelinka expressed interest in re-signing both LeBron James and Austin Reaves, plus more on the Lakers.

text: Cisco Earnings, Revenue Beat As Stock Hits Record High Amid Strong AI Orders - Investor's Business Daily
fullText: Cisco reported fiscal Q3 earnings and revenue that topped estimates. Cisco stock, which hit a record high on Wednesday, climbed on the news.

text: Murdaugh murder convictions overturned by South Carolina Supreme Court - The State
fullText: Disgraced attorney Alex Murdaugh was convicted of killing his wife and youngest son in 2023, but the South Carolina Supreme Court overturned that decision.

text: Eurovision Almost Didn’t Happen This Year Because of Israel Boycotts — and 2027 Is Dangling By a Thread - The Hollywood Reporter
fullText: A withdrawal of sponsorships and lost fees from nations sitting out over Israel's Netanyahu government put the contest on precarious financial footing. It remains on the precipice.

text: Apple Releases iOS 26.5: New Update Adds Long-Awaited Feature For iPhone - Forbes
fullText: After a month of testing, Apple has released a new update for iPhone with a major upgrade to messaging.

text: Kouri Richins offers advice to her sons and proclaims innocence in first public remarks - The Salt Lake Tribune
fullText: Kouri Richins, who did not testify in her own defense during her trial in March, addressed the court for the first time Wednesday.

text: These Android devices will get AirDrop next – here’s why your phone might not - 9to5Google
fullText: Google announced yesterday that its implementation of AirDrop support in Android’s Quick Share will be coming to more Android phones,...

text: Gunfire heard at Philippine Senate amid standoff with lawmaker facing arrest - The Washington Post
fullText: Ronald “Bato” dela Rosa — a senator, former national police chief and ally of imprisoned former president Rodrigo Duterte — faces crimes against humanity charges in The Hague.

text: Drug counselor who distributed ketamine that killed Matthew Perry sentenced to 2 years - NBC News
fullText: The man who pleaded guilty to distributing the ketamine that killed actor Matthew Perry was sentenced to 2 years in federal prison.

text: ‘KPop Demon Hunters’ Global Concert Tour Set by Netflix and AEG Presents - Variety
fullText: Netflix will produce a 'KPop Demon Hunters' global concert tour with AEG Presents.
